description_long: This airplane features a sharply angular, delta-shaped wing configuration with a wide, flat body and pronounced, swept-back wings. The fuselage is integrated smoothly into the wing structure, giving it a futuristic, stealth-like appearance. The rear section is densely packed with mechanical details, including multiple engine exhausts and intricate surface features. The wings are accented with dark red panels, contrasting with the otherwise metallic and gray exterior. The tail section is minimal, with no prominent vertical stabilizer, suggesting a blended or unconventional tail design. The cockpit is positioned at the forward tip of the fuselage, appearing as a small, enclosed canopy integrated into the nose.
description: A futuristic, delta-wing airplane with swept-back wings, a compact forward cockpit, and detailed rear engine components. The design features dark red wing accents and a sleek, metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, forward cockpit, and wide, angular wings with red accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thin, flat profile, swept-back wings, and the compact, integrated fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the densely detailed engine area, wide wingspan, and lack of a prominent vertical tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, emphasizing the low profile and mechanical complexity at the rear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, delta configuration with sharply swept-back wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Multiple jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Blended tail with no prominent vertical stabilizer, suggesting a tailless or flying wing configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, main and nose units implied by geometry.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the nose, likely single-seat with a streamlined canopy.
